summary.note: No GTM configuration changes were applied to optimized_container.json because duplicate ecommerce cleanup requires human analyst review.

changes.what_would_change: A human analyst may choose to disable, remove, or consolidate one duplicate GA4 purchase tag after review. This package does not apply that change.
changes.why_proposed: The two GA4 purchase event tags have the same event name, measurement ID variable, transaction ID variable, and firing trigger.
changes.unsafe_change_reason: Deleting or disabling ecommerce purchase tracking from an export alone may remove intentional tracking or affect production reporting.
changes.rollback_note: Because no file-based change was applied, rollback is to keep both original tags unchanged. If an analyst later disables/removes one tag in GTM, rollback would restore the original tag configuration and firing trigger from the source export.
changes.proposed_next_step: Use GTM Preview and a test purchase to determine whether both tags fire for the same event; document the intended keeper tag before making a workspace-level change.
